contextual_xor_ablation.description: Contextual XOR with initial (b1,b2) atoms; the useful new edge is the context distinction.

guarded_refinement.description: Guarded refine-or-repair decision with true, noise, and geometry-only candidate distinctions.

known_bayes_gap.description: Known Bayes-gap Bernoulli stream; old atoms observe Z and refined atoms observe (Z,U).
